name: ashlr
description: Open-source Claude Code plugin — 35 MCP tools (Read/Grep/Edit/MultiEdit/Ask/SQL/Bash/Tree/HTTP/Diff/Logs/Orient/PR+Issue + 4 GitHub write ops/Glob/WebFetch/DiffSemantic/Ls/EditStructural/Test/RenameFile/SearchReplaceRegex + genome tools), GitHub OAuth sign-in, auto-genome from public repos, cloud-genome pull on session start, PreToolUse redirect hooks (ASHLR_HOOK_MODE), unified $/MTok pricing (ASHLR_PRICING_MODEL), per-session token accounting, animated status line, shareable SVG savings badge. MIT, zero telemetry.
